pi_items.source: Magento core_config_data table: sales/msrp/enabled uses 1 for enabled state per official Magento configuration (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/magento/magento2/2.4-develop/app/code/Magento/Msrp/etc/config.xml)

pi_items.metadata_value: Add to cart to see our special low price!
pi_items.verified_value: Add to cart to see our special low price!
pi_items.source: Magento configuration path sales/msrp/explanation_message is validated in official config.xml. Message stored in core_config_data table. Task description specifies exact message to set.
Product LAPTOP-001 (Business Laptop Pro) is created during Magento environment initialization via REST API in setup_magento.sh at line 281

MSRP value (1200.00) is stored in catalog_product_entity_decimal table with attribute_id for 'msrp'. Verifier checks float value within 0.01 tolerance. Product created with price 999.99 but MSRP of 1200.00 is set by agent task.

Magento Msrp module Type.php source constants (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/magento/magento2/2.4-develop/app/code/Magento/Msrp/Model/Product/Attribute/Source/Type.php): TYPE_ON_GESTURE=1, TYPE_IN_CART=2, TYPE_BEFORE_ORDER_CONFIRM=3. Value 2 represents 'In Cart' display option.

privileged_info_summary: The map_pricing_config@1 task operates on a synthetic Magento 2 e-commerce environment with test data. Target product is LAPTOP-001 (Business Laptop Pro with base price 999.99, SKU LAPTOP-001), created via REST API during environment initialization. All metadata values are correct: MAP is enabled via sales/msrp/enabled=1 in core_config_data; the explanation message 'Add to cart to see our special low price!' is stored at sales/msrp/explanation_message; MSRP attribute 'msrp' stores the value 1200.00 as a decimal; display type attribute 'msrp_display_actual_price_type' uses numeric value 2 representing 'In Cart' per Magento source code constants.
